title: Wizard of Wor speech dictionary samples
description: Reduced input JSON for the Votrax Player wow palette tab. Each sample uses the phoneme-only SC-01 byte stream decoded from the Wizard of Wor speech token dictionary; encoded/actual byte variants are intentionally omitted.

source.name: Wizard of Wor speech word-token dictionary decode

decode.rule: bytes are actual_byte & 0x3F and are safe for direct SC-01/Votrax player playback
decode.stopByte: $3F is not automatically appended; these are dictionary entries, not complete game phrase scripts.

mappings.description: normal short Worrior/Warrior-like token becomes Worlord-like token
styled/inflected Worrior/Warrior-like token becomes styled/inflected Worlord-like token

samples.note: LD350==0 normal token; remaps to $40 when LD350!=0
samples.remapNote: LD350 normal token; replaced by token $40 when $D350 != 0.

samples.note: LD350==0 normal styled token; remaps to $41 when LD350!=0
samples.remapNote: LD350 normal styled token; replaced by token $41 when $D350 != 0.
